name: oci-deal-accelerator
description: Generate OCI architecture proposals from customer discovery notes. Produces slide decks, diagrams, cost estimates, and Well-Architected scorecards.

tools.name: generate_diagram
tools.description: Generate an OCI architecture diagram (.drawio) from a YAML spec

tools.name: generate_deck
tools.description: Generate an architecture proposal slide deck (.pptx) from a YAML spec

tools.name: generate_output
tools.description: Generate complete architecture proposal outputs (deck, diagram, cost spreadsheet)
